header.description: Invoice metadata and address details for the header section.

rows.description: Line items associated with the invoice.

semantics: Scalar tokens represent single values per invoice. Row tokens represent a one-to-many relationship where multiple line items exist per invoice. Parameters allow filtering the dataset by date range.
transformations: Concatenate customer city, state, and postal code to form client_address_2.
Format issue_date and due_date to 'DD-MM-YYYY HH:MM:SS'.
Apply currency formatting to unit_price and line_total.
Inject static literals for company details and terms.
